settings.cus_product_description: 50KPA Strong Suction | Self-stand | Anti-tangle | Dual Fragrance System | Stylish Design

settings.heading: Key Features
settings.content:
1. Strong Suction – 50KPA deep-cleaning power
2. Fresh Scent – Dual fragrance for cleaner air
3. Anti-Allergic – 7-layer HEPA allergen filter
4. Tangle-Free V Brush – No pet hair stuck inside
5. Stylish Design – Champagne gold, self-standing body
6. Easy to Use – 80 mins runtime, ultra-lightweight

<style>
    /* 美化表格并让它撑满弹窗 */
    table[style*="border-collapse: collapse;"],
    table[data-mce-fragment="1"] {
        width: 100%!important;
        table-layout: fixed;
        border-collapse: collapse;
        margin: 20px 0;
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
        background-color: #fff;
        overflow: hidden;
    }

    table[style*="border-collapse: collapse;"],
    table[data-mce-fragment="1"] {
        border-radius: 0;
    }

    table[style*="border-collapse: collapse;"] col,
    table[data-mce-fragment="1"] col {
        width: auto !important;
    }

    table[style*="border-collapse: collapse;"] td,
    table[data-mce-fragment="1"] td {
        padding: 14px 20px;
        text-align: left;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        word-break: break-word;
    }

    table[style*="border-collapse: collapse;"] tr:nth-child(even) td,
    table[data-mce-fragment="1"] tr:nth-child(even) td {
        background-color: #f9f9f9;
    }

    table[style*="border-collapse: collapse;"] tr:hover td,
    table[data-mce-fragment="1"] tr:hover td {
        background-color: #f3faff;
        transition: background-color 0.2s ease;
    }

    table[style*="border-collapse: collapse;"] td.et2,
    table[data-mce-fragment="1"] td.et2 {
        font-weight: normal;
        color: #333;
    }

    /* 响应式样式 - 移动端适配 */
    @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .modal-content {
            overflow-y: scroll !important;
            overflow-x: scroll !important;
        }

        .close {
            position: absolute;
            top: 89px;
            right: 13px;
        }
    }
</style>

settings.card_title: How to Replace the Scented Disc

settings.heading: What is the maximum suction power of the Honiture P7 Pro and how long does it last?
settings.content: Honiture P7 Pro provides super strong suction power up to 50KPa, which can deeply clean pet hair and stubborn dirt. It has a maximum running time of up to 80 minutes.

settings.heading: How does the Honiture P7 Pro handle tangles of pet hair, and is its filtration system hypoallergenic?
settings.content: The P7 Pro features a tangle-resistant V-shaped roller brush that effectively prevents hair from getting stuck, significantly reducing maintenance. Its 7-layer HEPA filtration system captures 99.99% of dust and allergens as small as 0.3μm, providing a powerful anti-allergy effect.

settings.heading: What practical functions does the Honiture P7 Pro's smart LED touch screen have?
settings.content: The P7 Pro is equipped with a smart LED touchscreen that allows users to easily switch between three suction power levels, check the remaining battery status at any time, and receive instant error alerts.

settings.heading: Is the Honiture P7 Pro easy to store and charge, and does it need to be mounted against a wall?
settings.content: The P7 Pro features a self-stand design and a lightweight body, making it easy to park or store at any time without having to lean against a wall.

settings.heading: Is the honiture P7pro a cordless rechargeable vacuum? How long does it take to fully charge?
settings.content: Yes, the P7 Pro is a rechargeable cordless vacuum cleaner.It takes about 4 hours to fully charge the battery from a full discharge.
